title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
description: An LLM-powered embodied lifelong learning agent for Minecraft
key_components: skill library for storing and retrieving complex behaviors
iterative prompting mechanism that generates executable code for embodied control
learning_approach: Prompting and in-context learning (no model parameter access or gradient-based training)
key_capabilities: Master a wide range of skills
Make new discoveries continually without human intervention
Propose suitable tasks based on current skill level and world state
Refine skills based on environmental feedback
Continually explore the world and seek out new tasks in a self-driven manner
advantages: Can represent temporally extended and compositional actions
Bypasses need for model parameter access
Bypasses need for explicit gradient-based training or finetuning
